tasks.title: Added a minimal TypeScript MCP server skeleton with mocked session.status protocol smoke testing
tasks.priority_reason: Migrated from the legacy module TODO.md so the module can use the Git-native task system.
tasks.summary: Added a minimal TypeScript MCP server skeleton with mocked `session.status` protocol smoke testing. ## Findings - EasyEDA's public ecosystem already includes an official API skill, bridge extension, SDK, extension debugging MCP, and router tooling. - The public MCP should build on typed domain tools rather than exposing a broad raw JavaScript execution surface.
risk_notes: This item was migrated mechanically from TODO.md; verify owner, priority and acceptance criteria before executing broad changes.
acceptance_criteria: The migrated item is either completed, split into more specific tasks, or closed with a clear outcome.
Relevant module documentation and validation are updated if the work changes module reality.
tasks.legacy_markdown:
Added a minimal TypeScript MCP server skeleton with mocked
      `session.status` protocol smoke testing.

## Findings

- EasyEDA's public ecosystem already includes an official API skill, bridge
  extension, SDK, extension debugging MCP, and router tooling.
- The public MCP should build on typed domain tools rather than exposing a
  broad raw JavaScript execution surface.
tasks.outcome: Migrated from a completed checkbox in the legacy TODO.md.
